kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=RIS, url=http://192.168.5.19:8023, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: 03-UI - Edit Admit Ris Patient

kw.name: Start Browser AdmitRis With Token
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: UnexpectedAlertPresentException: Alert Text: Token Not Found Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Token Not Found} (Session info: chrome=143.0.7499.170) Stacktrace: Symbols not available. kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Add Cookie
kw.doc: Adds a cookie to your current session.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
باز کردن کروم + تزریق کوکی token

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'css=.ngx-spinner-overlay,.loading-overlay,.spinner,.mat-progress-spinner,.cdk-overlay-backdrop' did not appear in 3 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'css=.ngx-spinner-overlay,.loading-overlay,.spinner,.mat-progress-spinner,.cdk-overlay-backdrop' did not appear in 3 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait For Spinner Hidden
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

Wait Until Page Contains Element

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Double Click Element
kw.doc: Double clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

test.doc: رفتن به سوابق پذیرش و ویرایش پذیرش
